2604.14878.title: GenRec: A Preference-Oriented Generative Framework for Large-Scale Recommendation
2604.14878.paper_summary: Generative Retrieval (GR) offers a promising paradigm for recommendation through next-token prediction (NTP). However, scaling it to large-scale industrial systems introduces three challenges: (i) within a single request, the identical model inputs may produce inconsistent outputs due to the pagination request mechanism; (ii) the prohibitive cost of encoding long user behavior sequences with multi-token item representations based on semantic IDs, and (iii) aligning the generative policy with nuanced user preference signals. We present GenRec, a preference-oriented generative framework deployed on the JD App that addresses above challenges within a single decoder-only architecture. For training objective, we propose Page-wise NTP task, which supervises over an entire interaction page rather than each interacted item individually, providing denser gradient signal and resolving the one-to-many ambiguity of point-wise training. On the prefilling side, an asymmetric linear Token Merger compresses multi-token Semantic IDs in the prompt while preserving full-resolution decoding, reducing input length by ~2X with negligible accuracy loss. To further align outputs with user satisfaction, we introduce GRPO-SR, a reinforcement learning method that pairs Group Relative Policy Optimization with NLL regularization for training stability, and employs Hybrid Rewards combining a dense reward model with a relevance gate to mitigate reward hacking. In month-long online A/B tests serving production traffic, GenRec achieves 9.5% improvement in click count and 8.7% in transaction count over the existing pipeline.
2604.14878.paper_summary_zh: 生成檢索（GR）透過下一個標記預測（NTP）提供了一個有前景的推薦範式。<lb/>然而，將其擴展到大規模工業系統會帶來三個挑戰：<lb/>(i) 在單個請求中，相同的模型輸入可能因為分頁請求機制而產生不一致的輸出；<lb/>(ii) 基於語義ID的多標記項目表示編碼長用戶行為序列的高昂成本，以及<lb/>(iii) 將生成策略與細緻的用戶偏好信號對齊。我們提出了GenRec，一個以偏好為導向的生成框架，部署在JD App上，解決上述挑戰，並且在單一的解碼器架構中運行。<lb/>對於訓練目標，我們提出了基於頁面的NTP任務，該任務監督整個互動頁面，而不是每個互動項目單獨進行，提供更密集的梯度信號並解決點對點訓練的一對多模糊性。<lb/>在預填充方面，一個不對稱的線性標記合併器在保留全分辨率解碼的同時壓縮提示中的多標記語義ID，將輸入長度減少約2倍，且幾乎不損失準確性。<lb/>為了進一步將輸出與用戶滿意度對齊，我們引入了GRPO-SR，一種強化學習方法，將群體相對政策優化與NLL正則化相結合以提高訓練穩定性，並採用混合獎勵，結合密集獎勵模型與相關性閘來減輕獎勵操控。在為生產流量提供的為期一個月的在線A/B測試中，GenRec在點擊數上實現了9.5%的提升，交易數上提升了8.7%，超過現有管道。
2604.14878.author: Yanyan Zou et.al.
2604.14878.authors: Yanyan Zou, Junbo Qi, Lunsong Huang, Yu Li, Kewei Xu, Jiabao Gao, Binglei Zhao, Xuanhua Yang, Sulong Xu, Shengjie Li
